title: Close the first playable measurement loop
objective: Wire the reward loop into the telemetry instrument so one deterministic local run produces a full aggregate snapshot.
implementationSteps: Import TelemetryInstrument from src/shared/TelemetryInstrument.luau where event names or required fields are needed.
Emit round_started from the round entry path.
Emit round_completed from the round terminal state.
Emit reward_claimed from the reward panel claim path or its server relay.
Emit next_round_started when the same session starts another round after completion or claim.
Add a fake/local harness that drives one complete loop and serializes an aggregate snapshot.
acceptanceCriteria: A local deterministic run can produce all five events in order.
The generated snapshot contains only aggregate metrics and no raw Roblox UserId.
The snapshot includes completion_rate, reward_claim_rate, and next_round_rate_after_claim.
The implementation can identify the biggest drop-off point in the loop.
Docs explain how to read the snapshot and choose the next product task.
nonGoals: Economy balancing beyond the first reward claim loop
Storing raw player identities in committed data
